item.title: They Brought Confederate Flags And Guns To A Child's Birthday Party. Hyesha Bryant Stood In Open Court And Delivered Her Impact Statement. The Court Delivered 35 Combined Years. Her Name Is Not A Footnote.
item.description: A child's birthday party. A CHILD'S BIRTHDAY PARTY. These two thought it was completely acceptable to roll up with Confederate flags, guns, racial slurs and death threats to a CHILD'S BIRTHDAY PARTY. The audacity is so staggering it has its own fucking gravitational field. Hyesha Bryant stood up in that courtroom and delivered her victim impact statement with more dignity and courage than those two showed in their entire lives combined. THAT is what accountability looks like. THAT is what the justice system is supposed to be FOR! ⚖️ 20 years. 15 years. In a Georgia courtroom. Using a hate crime statute that took YEARS of fighting to get enforced. This didn't happen automatically — it happened because bystanders filmed it, communities demanded it and one family refused to let it be dismissed. ✊⚖️ Norton cried in that courtroom like consequences were something that happened to other people. Hyesha Bryant cried at a birthday party because two adults with guns and Confederate flags terrorised her family. The difference between those two moments of tears is JUSTICE ⚖️ #HateCrime #Georgia #KaylaRaeNorton #JoeTorres #HyeshaBryant #RacialJustice #Accountability
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: I will be honest, I wanted to make a movie dump, but it ended as just a lot of stuff pilfered from shittymoviedetails on reddit.
item.description:
WHY!?
EDIT: Friday Frontpage! Thank you very much everyone! Hope you have an awesome weekend! I do reviews as a Hobby, and today I challenged one of the greatest: Adventures of Robin Hood is said to be the best adaptation of the character ever, so I tackled it to see if its true. You can check it here https://youtu.be/giQZhbWQbGk
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: Greenpeace: The war in Iran is a human tragedy.⁣ But for fossil fuel giants? It’s a goldmine.⁣ Over $75,000,000 added to FIVE oil CEOs’ fortunes in weeks.⁣ When conflict drives up energy prices, oil corporations cash in. – While we pay more for everything

item.title: GovBrief Today #462
item.description: Kathy Hochul didn't blink when it came to protecting New Yorkers, especially the kids. She wasn't guessing. Today, ProPublica documented 79 children harmed by federal agents using tear gas and pepper spray. Those are only the ones reporters could find and confirm. Tom Homan threatened twice this week to flood New York with more agents than the state had ever seen. That's the same kind of surge that hit Minneapolis a couple of months ago, where federal agents shot three people, killed two of them, and lied about all three. Hochul announced the budget framework anyway. The mask comes off in New York, and ICE can't walk into a school or hospital without a judge's warrant. Then she dared Homan to come ahead. Don't wait for the federal government to stop hurting kids. Use Resistbot and 5 Calls to contact your governor and demand protections from anonymous federal agents swarming your cities. I've emailed 7,307 stories over 462 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your name at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Easy-click links, more context, data, and pictures on the website: https://go.govbrief.today/260507-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/dhs-dna [2] https://go.govbrief.today/fema-council [3] https://go.govbrief.today/pope-rubio [4] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-may07 [5] https://go.govbrief.today/hanta-tracing [6] https://go.govbrief.today/gun-fedreg [7] https://go.govbrief.today/tn-map-passes [8] https://go.govbrief.today/humanities-grants [9] https://go.govbrief.today/tariffs-illegal-again [10] https://go.govbrief.today/omar-attacker [11] https://go.govbrief.today/desantis-everglades [12] https://go.govbrief.today/ice-glasses [13] https://go.govbrief.today/fed-child-injury [14] https://go.govbrief.today/eisenhower-building [15] https://go.govbrief.today/ny-ice-law Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Monte Mader (@montemader): "In the first video* TN legislators laugh at protestors yelling “No Jim Crow”. I saw a lot of hate, evil and racism today. But I also saw a lot of fight and a lot of hope. And I’ll be here when their white hooded world falls."
item.description: *Monte Mader @montemader - First vid from @agirlhasnopresident - Second from @bookersquared

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1681 (dinosaur toy)
item.description:
lets get this bread. out of prepared meme posts until my phone comes back but hopefully that will be today, inshallah. No, this bread is some sort of Georgian cheesebread
He's not one. go ahead, venetian knight, do your thing.
yeah but this particular feeling is all i can afford
Or post a bird. Some of y'all don't like birds as much as I do, and while i think that's weird, cats are okay as long as they're indoors.
Pippin tax today's message from Pippin: eeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222222354449p00 [he's on my computer keyboard] ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
